thing-type.label: Dahua VTO2202 Door Station
thing-type.description: Dahua VTO2202 outdoor station with single button

parameter.name: hostname
parameter.label: Hostname
parameter.description: Hostname or IP address of the device

parameter.name: snapshotPath
parameter.label: Snapshot Path
parameter.description: Path where snapshots will be saved (e.g., /var/lib/openhab/door-images)

parameter.name: useHttps
parameter.label: Use HTTPS
parameter.description: Use HTTPS (port 443) for snapshot and door-open requests. Enable if the device has HTTPS turned on. Disable for plain HTTP (port 80).

parameter.name: enableWebRTC
parameter.label: Enable WebRTC
parameter.description: Start a local go2rtc instance to bridge the RTSP stream to WebRTC. Requires go2rtcPath to be set.

parameter.name: go2rtcPath
parameter.label: go2rtc Binary Path
parameter.description: Absolute path to the go2rtc binary (e.g. /opt/go2rtc). Required when Enable WebRTC is on.

parameter.name: go2rtcApiPort
parameter.label: go2rtc API Port
parameter.description: HTTP API port for the go2rtc instance (default 1984). Must be unique per thing if multiple things run WebRTC.

parameter.name: webRtcPort
parameter.label: WebRTC Port
parameter.description: UDP/TCP port for WebRTC data (default 8555). Must be unique per thing if multiple things run WebRTC.

parameter.name: stunServer
parameter.label: STUN Server
parameter.description: STUN server for WebRTC NAT traversal in host:port format (default stun.l.google.com:19302).

parameter.name: rtspChannel
parameter.label: RTSP Channel
parameter.description: RTSP channel index on the device (default 1).

parameter.name: rtspSubtype
parameter.label: RTSP Sub-type
parameter.description: RTSP sub-type index: 0 = main stream, 1 = sub stream (default 0).
